name: Reasonable Cause Penalty Abatement for Fuel Reporting

eligibility.description: Applies to persons required to report on fuel vessels or facilities who miss deadlines or provide incorrect information but have a justifiable excuse.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can avoid a $10,000 penalty for failing to report information regarding vessels or facilities under section 4101 by demonstrating the failure was due to reasonable cause.
